sutta: monks there are these 4 powers what for the power of wisdom of energy of foreigners and of sympathy and what monks is the power of wisdom such conditions as are bad i reckon so such as a good reconcile such as a blame worthy are reconciled such such as our faultless arachno such as a reconcile such as a bright area console such as are not to be sought after our reconcile such as are to be sought after our reckon so such as are not truly aryan i reckon so such as are truly aryan reckons all these things are clearly seen and by wisdom well examined this month is called the power of wisdom
